content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886


March 22, 2002


Peter M. Thorson
Richards, Watson & Gershon
355 South Grand Avenue, 40th Floor
Los Angeles, CA 90071-3101

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-042

Dear Mr. Thorson:

This will confirm our telephone conversation of March 20, 2002, that you have withdrawn your request for advice. Thank you for your courtesy and cooperation in this matter.

If you have any other questions, or if I can be of further assistance, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Holly B. Armstrong
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

embedding.qa_text: The letter is from the Fair Political Practices Commission to Peter M. Thorson, an attorney at Richards, Watson & Gershon. The Commission confirms that Mr. Thorson has withdrawn his request for advice and expresses gratitude for his cooperation. The letter also states that if Mr. Thorson has any other questions or needs further assistance, he should contact Luisa Menchaca at (916) 322-5660. Here is the full text of the letter: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807 (916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886 March 22, 2002 Peter M. Thank you for your courtesy and cooperation in this matter. If you have any other questions, or if I can be of further assistance, please contact me at (916) 322-5660. Sincerely, Luisa Menchaca General Counsel By: Holly B. Armstrong Staff Counsel, Legal Division
